raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 336 ensures local communities are aware of any changes to state or local public health orders by requiring them to be posted to relevant websites and distributed via email.",
    "Current law authorizes California's Department of Public Health (CDPH) to take necessary measures to study and prevent the spread of a communicable disease.",
    "Existing law requires local health officers (LHO) to take similar steps to prevent the spread of the disease.",
    "SB 336 requires CDPH and LHO to publish new COVID-19 measures on their respective websites to ensure that communities and impacted industries are aware of changes.",
    "SB 336 requires CDPH and LHO to create a distribution list for those who wish to sign up for notifications about any changes in requirements.",
    "SB 336 would only be effective for the duration of the current public health crisis caused by COVID-19.",
    "SB 336 creates a communication framework for any future public health crisis."
  ]
}
```
